service.description: Azure Subscriptions appears across 2 normalized findings in 1 checklist families. 1 lower-confidence families broaden design coverage.
service.whatThisMeans: This service is covered mainly by preview or mixed-confidence guidance. Use it for specialist review with explicit validation.

notes: An official Azure Product Availability by Region offering could not be matched automatically for this service.

quality.label: Preview · Medium confidence
quality.summary: Use with architectural judgment. Preview content is valuable, but it should not be treated as equivalent to mature review baselines.

items.text: Do not create more than 2000 Citrix VDA servers per subscription
items.description: A Citrix Managed Azure subscription supports VMs with VDA for app/desktop delivery, excluding other machines like Cloud Connectors. When close to the limit, signaled by a dashboard notification, and with sufficient licenses, request another subscription. Can't exceed the given limits for catalogs.

items.text: Subscriptions should not be placed under the Tenant Root Management Group
items.description: The root management group in Azure is designed for organizational hierarchy, allowing for all management groups and subscriptions to fold into it.
items.graph:
// Azure Resource Graph Query
// Provides a list of Azure Subscriptions that are placed under the Tenant Root Management Group
resourcecontainers
| where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
| extend mgParentSize = array_length(properties.managementGroupAncestorsChain)
| where mgParentSize == 1
| project recommendationId="5ada5ffa-7149-4e49-9fbf-e67be7c2594c", name, id, tags

notes: An official Azure Product Availability by Region offering could not be matched automatically for this service.
